kobeBlue:HibernationPower.NAME: Hibernation
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of your next turn, remove #b

kobeBlue:AutomationPower.NAME: Automation
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you #yChannel an Orb, #yEvoke your leftmost Orb.

kobeBlue:HeavyDutyPower.NAME: Heavy-Duty
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you gain a debuff, gain #b

kobeBlue:TrialAndErrorPower.NAME: Trial and Error
DESCRIPTIONS: The first time you shuffle your draw pile each turn, gain #b
